name: Mojtaba Khamenei
summary: Day 75 of operational silence. **FIRST PUBLICLY-ATTRIBUTED SUBSTANTIVE POLICY DIRECTIVE FROM MOJTABA SINCE HIS APPOINTMENT IN MARCH — LEAKED MAY 21 VIA REUTERS WIRE: ENRICHED URANIUM (60%) ORDERED TO REMAIN STRICTLY INSIDE IRANIAN TERRITORY. THE VOICE ENTERED THE LEAK ARCHITECTURE EVEN AS THE PUBLIC-APPEARANCE SILENCE EXTENDS TO DAY 15.** Anonymous Iranian sources told Reuters (propagated via Algemeiner, Kathmandu Post, CDM Press May 21) that 'Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei ordered that Iran's stockpile of uranium enriched to 60% remain strictly inside Iranian territory' and that 'The Supreme Leader's directive, and the consensus within the establishment, is that the stockpile of enriched uranium should not leave the country.' Sources framed the reasoning as Iran would be 'more vulnerable to future attacks by the United States and Israel' if material left the country. **This is structurally the first publicly-attributed substantive policy directive from Mojtaba since his appointment in March, surfaced AT THE EXACT MOMENT the Pakistan-mediated framework is moving** — timing is consistent with regime-internal signal to Trump that the nuclear track is foreclosed independent of whatever ceasefire/Hormuz/sanctions architecture Pakistan can deliver. **The trigger 'Mojtaba Khamenei verified appearance' (watching Day 12 May 19) advances to Day 15 with the public-silence pattern intact but the leak-architecture-voice pattern now operative.** Pezeshkian's May 7 'I met him for 2.5 hours' remains the only senior-Iranian on-record confirmation; CNN's 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen' framing remains operative on the public-appearance axis. **The mechanism inside the deal architecture**: Trump's May 16 letter required full dismantlement + zero enrichment within 2 months; the leaked Al Arabiya text (May 22) addresses Hormuz/ceasefire/sanctions but NOT uranium; Mojtaba's directive (if real) makes the substantive nuclear track non-deliverable. **Sadjadpour 'two hubris' frame re-validated**: the institutional architecture is generating a public-foreclosure signal even as the procedural track moves paper through Pakistan — same pattern as May 19's IRIB 'retreat-based-on-fear' framing, escalated. **Verification discipline**: Reuters wire amplification via 3 outlets all trace to anonymous Iranian sources — counts as ONE source via wire amplification per the verification protocol. Tag at REPORTED, not CONFIRMED. **The institutional-command-without-visible-person equilibrium has now evolved**: where it was previously absence on both appearance AND voice dimensions, now Mojtaba's voice (directive) has entered public discourse via leak channel while his appearance remains absent. The regime has chosen the lowest-cost mode of policy signaling — let an attributed directive leak rather than produce a video. **This is institutional confidence**: if the regime were unable to produce Mojtaba at all, the directive would be too risky (it would invite an Iranian-official denial). The leak suggests the regime CAN produce him but chooses not to. PRIOR (May 19): **A5 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 11 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE — TASNIM RUNS ABDOLLAHI-BRIEFING NARRATIVE, NO VERIFIED APPEARANCE.** Tasnim reported Sunday-Monday that **Major General Ali Abdollahi, commander of Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters, briefed Mojtaba on the readiness of the armed forces** (army, IRGC, police, intelligence, border forces, defense ministry, Basij militia). **Second state-media positioning act in three days, following Pezeshkian's earlier claim that he had met with Mojtaba 'for hours.'** Middle East Forum frames these reports as a **deliberate state-media campaign to reinforce Mojtaba's leadership narrative in the absence of a verified appearance** — there has been no video, no audio, no photograph of Mojtaba since the war began, and Iran International continues to report (single-source diaspora) 'severe and disfiguring wounds, possible leg loss.' **The intensification of state-media positioning without a public appearance is the cleanest signal that the regime cannot produce him** — and yet the regime continues to consolidate decision-making around him on paper. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED at Day 11; the 'Iranian state media releases Mojtaba Khamenei video/audio refuting Mashhad mural within 7 days' trigger has expired UNTRIPPED. CLAIMED tag holds (Iranian state media reports ABOUT Mojtaba, not BY/OF Mojtaba). CNN April 21 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen' Western consensus reading; state-media positioning is the regime counter-narrative. **PRIOR (May 17): A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 10 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE** — no verified appearance or authenticated live audio/video since assuming role of Supreme Leader on March 8. Per current reporting (CNN, Iran International, The National Abu Dhabi, Voice of Emirates): more than two months of absence; statements attributed to him read out by others or issued in writing; the regime has used **AI-generated videos** to present 'messages' attributed to him; no authentic photos or audio recordings have surfaced. **The IRGC drill's invocation of late Ali Khamenei rather than Mojtaba (logged May 15) continues to be the cleanest institutional tell of the cycle on Mojtaba's constrained authority.** **Iran International's claim that Mojtaba issued 'new and decisive directives' without elaboration (CBS-cited) is single-sourced through diaspora press; verification tight, NO graph elevation.** **The institutional-command-without-visible-person equilibrium is stable.** Trigger ('Mojtaba appears on video/audio') UNTRIPPED. Pezeshkian's May 7 first-person claim of meeting Mojtaba remains the only senior-official-witnessed contact and is on record but unverified; The National Abu Dhabi (cited via earlier brief) tilted toward injury narrative in mid-May coverage. **PRIOR (May 16):** Day 70 of operational silence. **A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 9 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE** since Pezeshkian's May 7 reported meeting. **On May 13, a portrait of Mojtaba Khamenei was held during Iran's national football team's farewell ceremony ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup (channelstv primary observational)** — a **PORTRAIT**, NOT the Supreme Leader himself. **This is the institutional substitute for personal appearance** — a regime functioning around an absent center, willing to physically display imagery of Mojtaba in public space while withholding any actual appearance. The CNN April 21 framing 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen — that might be helping the regime to survive' continues to hold structurally. The IRGC drill's invocation of late Ali Khamenei rather than supposedly-active Mojtaba (closed yesterday Day 5/5) remains the institutional tell. Pezeshkian's May 7 first-person claim remains the only senior-official-witnessed contact. **Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio'** UNTRIPPED — institutional command without visible person remains stable equilibrium since Feb 28. **Day 70 of operational silence + portrait at football send-off = the regime is deliberately deploying photographic substitutes rather than re-emerging the actual person.** PRIOR (May 15): **A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 8 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE** post May 7 Pezeshkian meeting; no video, audio, or appearance since the May 7 Pezeshkian-meeting statement. **Today the IRGC's 'Martyred Commander' drill ended with codename 'Labbayk Ya Khamenei' — invoking the deceased Ali rather than the supposedly-active Mojtaba.** The drill's nomenclature leaning on Ali rather than Mojtaba is the institutional pattern of regime functioning around an absent center. **No Iranian state-media outlet (IRNA, Tasnim, Mehr, Press TV, Islam Times, Pars Today) has carried any direct Mojtaba statement, image, or recording May 8-15.** CNN's April 21 piece 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen' remains the cleanest English-language framing, with explicit mention of AI-generated videos of Khamenei being used by the regime, fueling speculation that he is incapacitated or abroad. The institutional pattern — IRGC drill nomenclature leaning on Ali rather than Mojtaba, Pezeshkian as the visible civilian face, Araghchi as the visible foreign-policy face, Wang Yi pressing for ceasefire May 6 with the comprehensive-strategic-partnership framing, and now Akraminia (Artesh) speaking on military readiness — is a regime functioning around an absent center. Sadjadpour's 'regime decapitated at the senior level' framing remains the cleanest read; Vali Nasr's 'time on Iran's side' thesis remains operative. No new public appearance, no audio, no video. **A12 STRUCTURAL SIGNAL: The IRGC's 5-day Tehran combat exercise launched May 12-13 was named 'Martyred Commander' / 'Labbayk Ya Khamenei' — invoking the LATE Ali Khamenei (Mojtaba's father, whose death was confirmed in March 2026), NOT Mojtaba.** When the IRGC explicitly invokes the deceased Khamenei rather than the supposedly-active new Supreme Leader, it suggests the institutional imagery is leaning on Ali's legacy because Mojtaba's visible authority is constrained. **This is the cleanest single new institutional signal in cycle that Mojtaba's authority is structurally limited.** Sadjadpour's 'regime decapitated at the senior level' framing remains the cleanest read; Vali Nasr's 'time on Iran's side' thesis remains operative. CNN April 21 long read + TIME's 'Iran's Supreme Leader No Longer Reigns Supreme' (April 21) remain the institutional analytic backdrop. Mehr News + Press TV + Tasnim + Islam Times all on the Martyred Commander codename — none of them on Mojtaba. Absence-of-appearance confirmed across IRNA / Tasnim / Press TV / Pars Today. PRIOR (May 13): Conflicting reports persist: NYT (citing four Iranian officials) says Mojtaba sustained serious injuries — multiple surgeries on legs and arms, difficulty speaking due to severe facial and lip burns. An aide rebuts with 'in perfect health... only a fracture behind his ear, slightly injured knee and back.' The National (Abu Dhabi) coverage tilted toward the injury-narrative read on May 10. CNN's April 21 'the regime's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen — that might be helping the regime survive' frame is now operational reality at 8+ weeks. **Institutional command without visible person remains the stable equilibrium that has carried the regime since February 28; the trigger (video/audio appearance) HAS NOT FIRED.** This is the operative read: Mojtaba's command is institutional, not visible. Iran tone HARDENING across IRNA/Tasnim/Parliament (Rezaei 90% rhetoric); Mohammadi (Deputy Labour Minister) publicly admitted >1 million direct job losses + 2 million unemployment-impacted — domestic economic damage now publicly quantified by Tehran while command remains absent. ORIGINAL CONTEXT (May 12): **PEZESHKIAN-MOJTABA 2.5-HOUR MEETING CLAIM IS NOW DAY 4 WITHOUT IRANIAN STATE-MEDIA CORROBORATION (no video, no audio, no photo, no readout, no location, no participant list).** **NETANYAHU CBS 60 MINUTES AIRED MAY 11: 'I BELIEVE [MOJTABA] IS ALIVE BUT HE'S HOLED UP IN SOME BUNKER' — independently consistent with US intel community May 8 assessment (CNN/KVIA) that Mojtaba is 'shaping strategy' but 'out of public view.' Convergence of US + Israeli intel framing on 'alive but in bunker' AGAINST the absence of any Iranian state-media physical evidence is the operative read: Mojtaba's command is institutional, not visible.** Pezeshkian's May 12 'resistance and protecting honor' speech at Ministry of Industry made no fresh reference to the alleged meeting. The continued vacuum reinforces the Stage-2 managed-leadership-vacuum read. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 65. The Pezeshkian claim and US-intel + Israeli-intel 'alive but in bunker' lines operate against each other in the public information space, with the US-intel + Israeli-intel reading now CONVERGENT (single source originally, now multi-source). Mokhber 'atomic-bomb' Hormuz doctrine remains the most recent leadership-adjacent articulation. Iran's source tone is hardening (Tasnim's Velayati Trump-Xi summit-timed jab; IRNA's Army spokesperson Akraminia 'surprising options' warning) but no public statement attributed to Mojtaba in any form. No date, location, participant list, readout, video, photo, or audio. The information vacuum is widening, not narrowing. CNN/KVIA US-intel assessment that Mojtaba is 'alive and shaping strategy' but 'out of public view' unchanged. **This is itself an intelligence signal:** if a credible meeting had occurred, the regime would by now have produced video or at minimum a photograph for domestic legitimacy — particularly during a week when the supreme leader's authority over a potential MOU is the central question. The continued vacuum reinforces the Stage-2 managed-leadership-vacuum read. **Mokhber 'atomic-bomb' Hormuz doctrine speech remains the most recent leadership-adjacent articulation** — no new public statement by Mokhber today; no Iranian state media has produced a follow-up speech, retraction, or amplification in past 24 hours. The institutional intelligence value of Mokhber's speech is durable. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 63. CNN sources continue to report fractured foot, bruised eye, minor lacerations from Feb 28 strike. The Pezeshkian claim and US-intel 'out of public view' line operate against each other in the public information space. Pezeshkian provided NO date, NO location, NO list of other participants, NO substantive readout, NO video/audio/photo. Read as intelligence: regime is in second stage of a managed-leadership-vacuum playbook — Stage 1 (March-April) was written-only statements via state TV; Stage 2 (May) is named senior officials publicly attesting to private contact with the supreme leader without producing evidence. **MOKHBER 'ATOMIC-BOMB' SPEECH REINFORCES THE THESIS:** Mohammad Mokhber (described in Pakistani/Iranian outlets as adviser to Mojtaba specifically) publicly delivered the maximalist Hormuz-control doctrine May 8 — leadership-adjacent voices speaking publicly while Mojtaba himself remains absent. Yesterday's TIME April 21 disclosure of AI-generated videos remains structural reason MOU signature within one week is implausible — leadership-decision authority cannot be exercised through proxies on a deal of this scale. The Pezeshkian claim therefore reads as a credibility-borrowing move INSIDE the negotiation as much as a domestic-narrative move. The IRGC-vs-civilian-government factional split is not closed by an unverifiable face-to-face claim, particularly one made in the same week IRGC publicly attacked three US destroyers mid-MOU window. Iran International (diaspora) had run Pezeshkian-IRGC factional-divergence framing this week. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 62. CNN sources continue to report fractured foot, bruised eye, minor lacerations from Feb 28 strike.

sources: CDM Press May 21 'Ayatollah Orders Highly-Enriched Uranium To Remain In Iran' (Reuters wire amplification)
Reuters citing anonymous Iranian sources (single primary, three-outlet wire propagation)
recent_signals.verification: Mojtaba uranium directive = REPORTED (Reuters wire via 3 outlets all trace to anonymous Iranian sources — counts as ONE source via wire amplification); public-silence Day 15 = CONFIRMED ABSENCE multi-source; substantive nuclear-track foreclosure inference = INFERRED structural reading based on REPORTED directive.

recent_signals.headline: **DAY 12 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE — CNN re-circulated piece 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen — that might be helping the regime to survive.'** No public appearance, no video, no audio across the two months since appointment by the Assembly of Experts following Ali Khamenei's Feb 28 death. The regime has reportedly used AI-generated videos to show Khamenei delivering messages (Iran International, opposition-leaning but corroborated by Western mainstream framing). Pezeshkian's May 7 claim of meeting Mojtaba 'for two and a half hours' remains uncorroborated by image, audio, or third-party witness. **The May 17 Tasnim claim that Maj. Gen. Ali Abdollahi 'briefed Mojtaba on armed-forces readiness' is the second state-media positioning act in five days that names Mojtaba in operational-command function without producing him.** CLAIMED status load-bearing because it preserves the institutional pillar of 'Iran has a supreme commander capable of binding the regime to a deal.' **Now structurally connects to the Pakistan-mediation deal-execution question**: even if a framework draft is produced, who in the Iranian institutional architecture has the authority to sign it? **Trigger consideration**: 'Mojtaba verified appearance within 14 days of Pakistan mediation framework publication' could be added if a framework draft surfaces — currently no draft, so no trigger added today.
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED ABSENCE on appearance; ESCALATING META-COVERAGE; verification floor maintained — Tasnim's reports ABOUT Mojtaba, not BY/OF Mojtaba, remain CLAIMED.

recent_signals.headline: **DAY 11 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE — TASNIM RUNS ABDOLLAHI-BRIEFING NARRATIVE, NO VERIFIED APPEARANCE.** Tasnim Sunday-Monday: Major General Ali Abdollahi (Khatam al-Anbiya Central HQ commander) briefed Mojtaba on readiness of armed forces (army, IRGC, police, intelligence, border forces, defense ministry, Basij militia). Second state-media positioning act in three days (after Pezeshkian's earlier 'met for hours' claim). **Middle East Forum frames as 'deliberate state-media campaign to reinforce Mojtaba's leadership narrative in the absence of a verified appearance'** — no video, no audio, no photograph since the war began. Iran International (diaspora opposition) maintains single-source 'severe and disfiguring wounds, possible leg loss' wound claim. **The intensification of state-media positioning without public appearance is the cleanest signal the regime cannot produce him** — yet continues to consolidate decision-making around him on paper. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED at Day 11; 'Iranian state media releases Mojtaba Khamenei video/audio refuting Mashhad mural within 7 days' trigger has expired UNTRIPPED. CNN April 21 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen — that might be helping the regime to survive' = Western consensus reading; state-media positioning is the regime counter-narrative. Pair with TASS/Xinhua non-amplification of Trump posts + Houthi Red Sea Day 7 untripped = coordinated quietism across Iran's institutional surfaces while Western kinetic-preparation rhetoric escalates.
sources: Middle East Forum 'Iranian Media Reinforce Narrative of Mojtaba Khamenei's Leadership' (independent analysis)
Tasnim News Agency (Iranian state-affiliated — Abdollahi briefing primary)
CNN April 21 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen' (Western critical)
Iran International (diaspora opposition, single-source wound claims)
recent_signals.verification: Abdollahi briefing reportedly delivered = CLAIMED Iranian state media (Tasnim primary; report ABOUT Mojtaba not BY/OF Mojtaba — verification floor); No verified appearance since Feb 28 = CONFIRMED ABSENCE multi-source (IRNA/Tasnim/Press TV); Middle East Forum analysis = CONFIRMED independent observation; Iran International wound claims = REPORTED single-source diaspora.

recent_signals.headline: **A6 DAY 7 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE post May 7 Pezeshkian meeting — no new public appearance, no audio, no video.** **A12 STRUCTURAL SIGNAL: The IRGC's 5-day Tehran combat exercise launched May 12-13 was named 'Martyred Commander' / 'Labbayk Ya Khamenei' — invoking the LATE Ali Khamenei (Mojtaba's father, whose death was confirmed in March 2026), NOT Mojtaba.** When the IRGC explicitly invokes the deceased Khamenei rather than the supposedly-active new Supreme Leader, it suggests the institutional imagery is leaning on Ali's legacy because Mojtaba's visible authority is constrained. **This is the cleanest single new institutional signal in cycle that Mojtaba's authority is structurally limited.** Sadjadpour's 'regime decapitated at the senior level' framing reinforced; Vali Nasr's 'time on Iran's side' thesis remains operative.
sources: Mehr News + Press TV + Tasnim + Islam Times + Pars Today (all on the Martyred Commander codename, none of them on Mojtaba)
Absence-of-appearance confirmed across IRNA / Tasnim / Press TV / Pars Today
CNN April 21 long read (institutional analytic backdrop)
TIME 'Iran's Supreme Leader No Longer Reigns Supreme' April 21 (institutional analytic backdrop)
recent_signals.verification: Mojtaba Day 7 silence = CONFIRMED ABSENCE multi-source; IRGC drill codename invoking Ali (deceased father) rather than Mojtaba = CONFIRMED ACTION (Iranian state media multi-source) — analytical reading of structural signal is INFERRED.

recent_signals.headline: A6 DAY 6 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE POST PEZESHKIAN MAY 7 MEETING; no video/audio of Mojtaba since March 8 appointment. NYT (citing four Iranian officials): serious injuries — multiple surgeries on legs and arms, facial and lip burns affecting speech. Iranian aide rebuts: 'perfect health... only fracture behind ear, slightly injured knee and back.' The National (Abu Dhabi) coverage tilted toward injury narrative May 10. CNN April 21 'the regime's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen — that might be helping the regime survive' frame is now operational reality at 8+ weeks. Institutional command without visible person = stable equilibrium since Feb 28. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' HAS NOT FIRED. Iran tone HARDENING across IRNA/Tasnim/Parliament while command remains absent — Mohammadi (Deputy Labour Minister) publicly admitted >1 million direct job losses + 2 million unemployment-impacted; Day 74 of internet blackout. Tehran publicly admitting domestic economic deterioration WHILE publicly hardening on nuclear file. Pezeshkian-Mojtaba 2.5-hour meeting still has no state-media corroboration (Day 6).

The National (Abu Dhabi) 'how injured is Mojtaba Khamenei' — UAE state

recent_signals.headline: DAY 63-64 ABSENCE HOLDS — NO IRANIAN STATE MEDIA CORROBORATION OF PEZESHKIAN'S MAY 8 CLAIM OF 2.5-HOUR FACE-TO-FACE MEETING IN THE 48 HOURS SINCE; INFORMATION VACUUM WIDENING. No date, location, participant list, readout, video, photo, or audio. The continued vacuum is the strongest evidence the meeting did not occur as described. CNN/KVIA US-intel assessment 'alive shaping strategy out of public view' unchanged. Mokhber 'atomic-bomb' Hormuz doctrine speech remains the most recent leadership-adjacent articulation — no new statement, retraction, or amplification today. Stage 2 managed-leadership-vacuum playbook reinforced. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 63.

Times of Israel + L'Orient + MEE + Deccan Herald (Mokhber speech, no new statement today)

Pezeshkian claim reads as credibility-borrowing move INSIDE the negotiation. The IRGC-vs-civilian-government factional split is not closed by an unverifiable face-to-face claim, particularly one made the same week IRGC publicly attacked three US destroyers (May 7). historical_summaries.summary: 4 signals. Appointed Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts | First statement read on Press TV by anchor (no video/audio of Khamenei himself) | Day 29 of conflict — still no video or audio recording of Mojtaba Khamenei released
21 signals. Day 34 of war, Day 25 since appointment as Supreme Leader on March 8 | Day 35: Still no video or audio of Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei | Day 37 of war, Day 28 since appointment
